title: CareTask
description: One scheduled care action as the Verdant mock API returns it (fictional demo data). The shape care-task-row binds; plantId references a Plant (plant-card.contract.json) by id.

plantId.description: id of the plant this task belongs to

plantName.description: denormalised for display — the row renders without fetching the plant

status.description: derived server-side from due vs now
